backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping four menu image update requirements (Porsian 5pcs, Party Pack 40pcs, Party Pack 50pcs, and static asset rendering) to Menu.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file describing their roles in the SUMOJI dim sum ordering app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using the OKLCH color system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Dim Sum Food Orders Landing Page' that mounts the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages order state (add, update quantity, clear) and composes Hero, Menu, OrderForm, Footer, and Toaster components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying SUMOJI branding, DKI Jakarta address, phone number, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dim sum background image, SUMOJI branding, 'Steam. Snap. Repeat.' tagline, and an 'Order Now' button that smooth-scrolls to the menu.
frontend/src/components/Menu.tsx: Menu section rendering three dim sum items (Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, Party Pack 50pcs) with ingredient checkboxes, quantity controls, and add-to-order functionality using newly generated PNG images.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: Order form component handling cart summary, contact details input, QRIS payment confirmation, and order submission with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; notes that all order data is stored locally in the browser with no backend queries needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm cream/red/gold theme with light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/lib/formatCurrency.ts: Exports a single utility function that formats a number as Indonesian Rupiah currency string (e.g., 'Rp. 17.500,-').
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends border radius and animations, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Sumoji Dim Sum app, tracking existing features related to updating menu item images for Porsian (5pcs), Party Pack 40pcs, and Party Pack 50pcs, along with image requirements and architectural notes.
